penalties.fact: During post-Qualifying Technical Inspection, GTD-PRO Car #48 was found to have a minimum ground clearance lower than permitted per IMSA GTD-PRO Technical Regulations Article 7.4.5
penalties.decision: Qualifying lap times are invalidated, Car is moved to the back of the Class.

penalties.fact: During post-Race Technical Inspection, GTP Car #10 was found to have camber in excess of the permitted tire pressure limit as defined by MMMTB-IWSC-2026-10
penalties.decision: Car is moved to the back of the Class

penalties.fact: Riccardo Pera completed a Drive Time of 2:38:11.220 under the minimum 3 hours
